_format.note: Voice prose. The protagonist's first-person narration (Patient 0413, 'I') for system moments — title scene, between rooms, descent transitions, end states. Also the institutional system text — short labels in the document voice. Inline markup applies: ~~strike~~, [[N]], **gold**, !!red!!.

structure.system: tiny clinical labels — section headers, status words
structure.protagonist: the first-person narrative of Patient 0413 across the run
structure.session: narration that appears in the session log during combat
structure.outcomes: narration when a session ends — win/loss/file/release wording

system.observe: I watch them for a beat.
system.fixation_unknown: ─ I have not figured them out yet ─

intro: I found the address on a card I do not remember writing. The road ended at the building.
The nurse opened the door before I knocked. She handed me a file. She said it had been waiting for me.
between_sessions: I sit in the corridor for a moment. The light has not changed.
I walk on. The next door is open.
The lights in the corridor flicker. I do not stop.
I move to the next room. ~~I know which one it is.~~
A door is open ahead. I have not been told whose room it is.
between_floors: There are stairs at the end of the corridor. I take them down.
The stairwell smells of the floor wax it always smells of. I descend.
The next floor is colder. The light is the same.
I do not remember coming down the last set of stairs. ~~I have been counting.~~
protagonist.rest_short: I sit. I do what is left of myself.
protagonist.rest_long: I sit for longer. The corridor does not seem to mind.
protagonist.victory_intro: I have reached the bottom. ~~The door at the top is open.~~
protagonist.loss_intro: I did not. The file is closed. !!I am not the one closing it.!!

open: The door is open. ~~They are at it.~~ I step into the room.
The room is theirs. The door closes behind me.
I am at the threshold. They are inside. !!I go in.!!

win_press_vs_hold: They do not let go ~~yet~~. I find a way past.
I find the seam in their stillness.
win_hold_vs_yield: They tried to leave. I was already standing.
They cede the room. I keep it.
I stay where they are not.
win_yield_vs_press: They reach into the space I left. It is empty.
They overcommit. I am not where I was.
They swing through. ~~They will not again.~~
lose_press_vs_yield: They have already moved. I swing into the room.
I overcommit. ~~The room turns under me.~~
They were not where I left.
lose_hold_vs_press: I stand. They take it as if I had not.
lose_yield_vs_hold: They were already there. The room is theirs.
I gave ground. There was none.
clash_press: We meet in the middle of the room.
We both lean. Neither of us is the smaller.
clash_yield: Neither of us is in the room anymore.
The room is empty for a beat.

low_composure: The room is darker than it was a moment ago.
The light has begun to ~~flicker~~ falter.
I am tired. The room knows it.
I hear my own breath. ~~Or theirs.~~
session.observe: I watch. I do not move. They register me.
session.rules_brief: Press cuts through Hold. Hold catches Yield. Yield slips past Press.

outcomes.reach_intro: They are with me, now. The room is mine for a moment.
outcomes.reach_file: I write them into the line behind me. Their file closes against mine. !!We descend together.!!
outcomes.reach_release: I let them rest. The file closes. I take what they have left in the room.
outcomes.loss_intro: They have overcome me. The file rewrites. ~~Some of it is mine.~~
outcomes.loss_minor: I leave the room with less in me than I came with. !!I continue.!!
outcomes.loss_fatal: I do not leave the room. The door closes behind ~~me~~ someone.

system_messages.tell_unknown: I have not read this before.
system_messages.fixation_hidden: I do not understand them yet.
